decisions.cat1_intent_fidelity: 4 decisions: A-accepted (clarify 'intelligent' in overview), B-accepted (move triggers from frontmatter to When to Use), C-accepted (clarify 'system health' = project health not infra), OPP-1A-accepted (add 'What This Skill Does NOT Do' note)
decisions.cat2_workflow_sequencing: 6 decisions: A-accepted (add warm-up before Phase 1), B-accepted (phase transition markers), C-accepted-as-no-change (keep Self-Audit at Phase 6 — current placement is fine), D-accepted (graceful skip for zero alerts), E-accepted (mid-workflow escape hatch after every 10 alerts), F-accepted (compaction resilience — persist decisions to session JSONL incrementally)
decisions.cat3_input_output_quality: 6 decisions: A-accepted (add alert object schema), B-accepted (done-when gates for Phases 3, 5, 7), C-accepted (checker failure handling — surface no_data as INFO alert), D-accepted (completion artifact summary), E-accepted (dashboard format with benchmark cross-ref, sort worst-first), F-accepted (session JSONL record format)
decisions.cat4_decision_points: 5 decisions: A-accepted (recommend action per alert based on severity+trend), B-accepted (delegation protocol for batch-accepting), C-accepted (cross-reference session JSONL format), D-accepted (decision revision gate at Phase 4), E-accepted (alert grouping for 3+ similar items)
decisions.cat5_integration_surface: 6 decisions: A-accepted (expand Integration section with neighbors, input, output, downstream), B-accepted (routing guide vs audit-health and ecosystem-health), C-accepted (document top script dependencies), D-accepted (invocation tracking — value depends on review pipeline consuming the data), E-accepted (skill-routing in suggested actions), OPP-5A-accepted (context-aware mode selection: limited from session-begin, ask standalone)
decisions.cat6_guard_rails: 6 decisions: A-accepted (script failure handling — don't proceed on crash), B-accepted (partial output recovery — show raw output, ask to debug or skip), C-accepted (suppression ratio guard >50%), D-accepted (scope escalation guard — pause if fix >5min or >3 files), E-accepted (script timeout guidance — 120s kill), F-accepted (baseline staleness check >7 days)
decisions.cat7_prompt_engineering: 4 decisions: A-accepted (add MUST/SHOULD/MAY to all instructions), B-accepted (add Critical Rules section front-loaded), C-accepted (move scoring formula to Phase 2 with cross-reference), D-accepted (expand Phase 3 with context card format example)
decisions.cat8_scope_boundaries: 4 decisions: A-accepted (replace generic When NOT to Use with named alternatives), B-accepted (add routing guide for health-related skills), C-accepted (duplicate-run detection via session JSONL timestamp), D-accepted (inline-fix vs skill-handoff guidance — 2min threshold)
decisions.cat9_institutional_memory: 5 decisions: A-accepted (CLAUDE.md reference for inline fixes), B-accepted-modified (learning loop feedback → alerts-history.jsonl not ephemeral session JSONL, consumed by Phase 6 checker review), C-accepted (preserve trend data to alerts-history.jsonl, consumed by Phase 2 dashboard), D-accepted (surface cross-session trends in Phase 2 dashboard from alerts-history.jsonl), E-accepted (persist suppression rationale, consumed by Phase 6 stale review)
decisions.cat10_user_experience: 6 decisions: A-accepted (warm-up — point-of-use repetition of Cat2-A), B-accepted (progress indicators in Phase 3 — alert N of M), C-accepted (dashboard table format with score/rating/alerts/trend columns), D-accepted (closure summary format — point-of-use of Cat3-D), E-accepted (visual formatting guidance per phase), OPP-10A-rejected (no emoji — project convention)
decisions.operational_script_fixes: 6 accepted: OD-A (fix findProjectRoot CRITICAL), OD-B (add 7 missing weights), OD-C (consistent no_data handling for all checkers), OD-D (addContext for checkReviewQuality), OD-E (add action field to 3 alerts), OD-F (add type-check npm script)
decisions.operational_scoring: 1 accepted: OD-H (document measuredPct in health score output)
decisions.operational_data_sources: COMPLETE — 7 files investigated: 4 real bugs found (DS-1: absolute path rejection in post-read-handler.js kills context tracking, DS-4: saveWarnedFiles dead code in check-pattern-compliance.js, DS-5: no writer for commit-failures.jsonl, DS-6: log-session-activity.js never called automatically), 3 expected behavior (DS-2/DS-3: agent files only created when agents used, DS-7: velocity-log works)

pending: Phase 4: Implementation — 83 total items (58 SKILL.md + 12 script + 4 data source + 5 skill-creator + 4 skill-audit)

USER-REQ-2: Skill-audit scope MUST include operational dependencies — AGREED: A(scripts)=MUST, B(hooks)=SHOULD, C(data files)=MUST, D(npm scripts)=SHOULD, E(docs)=SHOULD, F(function health)=MAY/MUST if >3 functions, G(state files)=MUST for ALL skills, H(adjacent skills)=Phase 3 crosscheck

process_compliance_notes: Operational dependency check added between Phase 2 and Phase 3 per USER-REQ-2.
